misses: New regimes and unseen tail events
implementation_control: Compare against stress tests before accepting the number

formula_or_rule: mean + z_alpha * standard deviation under a distribution assumption
misses: Fat tails, skew, jumps, and nonlinear payoff curvature
implementation_control: Validate distribution assumption and use CVaR/tail checks

formula_or_rule: Simulate risk-factor paths and take the alpha-percentile loss
captures: Multi-factor scenarios and nonlinear portfolios if the simulator is good
misses: Wrong model, wrong correlations, missing stress scenarios
implementation_control: Seed, version, and backtest the simulation engine

formula_or_rule: Average loss conditional on being beyond the VaR threshold
captures: Tail severity beyond the cliff edge
misses: Still depends on observed or simulated tail sample
implementation_control: Report next to VaR so a threshold loss is not mistaken for worst loss

formula_or_rule: VaR plus estimated liquidation cost from spread/depth/participation
captures: The cost of getting out when size meets limited depth
misses: Sudden market closure or exchange-level halt unless stress-tested
implementation_control: Tie max order size and participation to order-book depth

formula_or_rule: Replay historical or hypothetical shocks against today's book
captures: Black-swan survivability and known crisis templates
misses: Unknown unknowns and operational failures unless included
implementation_control: Include 2008, 2011, COVID, geopolitical, tariff, and exchange-failure events
